tagline: Dashboard embedding for external users is generally available: Embed AI/BI dashboards in external applications without requiring viewers to have Databricks accounts.
what_it_does: Dashboard embedding for external users is generally available: Embed AI/BI dashboards in external applications without requiring viewers to have Databricks accounts. Hide Databricks logo in embedded dashboards: Externally embedded dashboards now support hiding the Databricks logo using the hideDatabricksLogo option. Metric view lineage highlighting: Hovering over metric views in the lineage pane now highlights the visualizations built on those metric views.
why_it_matters: Genie Code's access and actions are governed by the user's permissions.

capabilities.title: "Create a dashboard showing bakehouse
capabilities.desc: "Create a dashboard showing bakehouse trends from the @salestransactions table."

capabilities.title: "Build a sales performance dashboard
capabilities.desc: "Build a sales performance dashboard using @salesdata with revenue by region and product category."

capabilities.title: "Create a customer analytics dashboard
capabilities.desc: "Create a customer analytics dashboard from @customerdata showing retention, churn, and engagement metrics."

capabilities.title: "Add a line chart showing
capabilities.desc: "Add a line chart showing sales trends over time from this dataset."

key_takeaway: Dashboard embedding for external users is generally available: Embed AI/BI dashboards in external applications without requiring viewers to have Databricks accounts.
